resources.string: End time must be after start time
Revenue today, open tickets, low stock
System role — permissions are managed by the server and cannot be edited here.
All permission changes will be discarded and the server defaults will be reloaded.
This role has no permissions defined. Update your server to populate the permission list.
Tickets assigned to you with status "In Repair" will appear here.
This will end the shift and generate the Z-report. This cannot be undone.
Make sure you have printed or recorded the Z-report before continuing.
Update your server to enable membership tiers and loyalty points.
Pair a Bluetooth scale in Android Settings, then refresh here.
Remove the paired scale? You can re-pair it at any time.
Tap phone to reader to redeem loyalty points
Tap a Bizarre-issued NFC card to look up the customer automatically.
Print skipped — reprint from Sales History when printer reconnects
Label skipped — reprint from Inventory when printer reconnects
Invoice print skipped — reprint from Invoice when printer reconnects
Clock in or out directly from the home screen
See how many inventory items are below reorder level
Clock in or out of your shift
VoIP not configured on this server
Contact your admin to set up voice calling.
This voicemail will be permanently deleted from the provider.
Recording is not enabled on this tenant
Your jurisdiction requires all parties to consent before a call is recorded. An announcement will be played to the remote party at the start of the call.
Microphone access is required to record calls on this device. Audio is processed on the server — the app only captures the device microphone stream.
Enable to allow this specific call to be recorded and stored on the server.
This will void the link and the customer will no longer be able to pay. This cannot be undone.
The customer will receive another SMS or email with the payment link.
Payment links not configured on this server
Physically count stock on shelves and reconcile against system quantities. Works fully offline — adjustments sync on commit.
You are offline. The session will run locally and sync adjustments to the server when connectivity is restored.
Scan a barcode or search by name to add items to the count sheet.
Write adjustments for %1$d counted items. This cannot be undone.
All counted quantities will be lost. System stock is unchanged.
Variance adjustments are pending manager approval. Stock levels have been updated locally.
Tap “+Add template” to create your first device template.
Device templates require a server connection.
Tap “+Add service” to create your first pricing entry.
Repair pricing requires a server connection.
Device catalog requires a server connection.
Device catalog is empty on this server.
Manager PIN required for refunds over $50
Signature pad. Draw your signature with a stylus or finger. Keyboard not supported for this field.
%1$d changes pending sync. Tap to open sync issues.
Offline — showing cached data. %1$d changes pending sync.
Clocked in — %1$s. Tap to clock out or open clock screen.
Not clocked in — %1$s. Tap to clock in or open clock screen.
Clock in / out — %1$s. Tap to open clock screen.
QR code for ticket %1$s. Tap to enlarge.
Busy Hours heatmap: 7-day by 24-hour ticket volume grid.
Busy Hours heatmap: no data yet.
Choose what this widget shows. More options (tenant, time range) coming in a future update.
Choose a ticket to attach this to, or create a new note.
Health score data unavailable.\nThis feature requires server support.
LTV tier data unavailable.\nThis feature requires server support.
Tier thresholds (e.g. VIP ≥ $1,000) are configured by your shop administrator.
Send win-back SMS to at-risk customers
Remove this goal permanently? This cannot be undone.
Team inbox not enabled on this server
Create a new warranty-return check-in for %1$s?
This device has been repaired 3 or more times
TRAINING MODE — data is not saved
Training mode is active. Data is not saved.
Practice workflows using demo data. Nothing is sent to the server — SMS, emails, and payments are intercepted locally.
The following demo data is available when training mode is on. It resets when you tap Reset below.
BlockChyp sandbox card numbers for POS practice
4 demo tickets across Diagnosed, Waiting, Ready, and In Progress
No SMS or email sends intercepted yet. Try sending a message while training mode is on.
This will clear the intercepted-send log and all checklist progress. Demo customers, tickets, and inventory will be restored to their original state.
Audit chain integrity check failed — log may have been tampered with
Can\'t reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
Something went wrong on our end. We\'re looking into it.
This item no longer exists or was removed.
You\'re offline. Showing saved data — some info may be out of date.
Something went wrong. Try again or contact support.
Create a ticket to get started
Tap + to add one, or import from Contacts
Offline — showing cached data. Some info may be out of date.
Ask your admin to enable this feature.
Choose which columns appear on ticket rows.
Camera access is needed to capture repair photos.
Ask your admin to enable this.
This ticket changed. Reload to merge.
A reason is required. The extension is audit-logged.
The import job is still running. Cancelling will leave it in progress on the server — you can check status later from Settings.
Going back will discard your current column mapping. You can re-detect columns when you return.
Point camera at a customer QR or barcode card
Camera access is required to scan customer cards.
Camera viewfinder for scanning customer card
No notes yet. Add the first note below.
This note will be permanently deleted.
Cancel this order? Stock will not be adjusted. This cannot be undone.
You can leave this screen — you\'ll be notified when ready.
The export job will be abandoned and you\'ll need to start a new one.
Manager access required to export data.
Export is not configured on this server.
Enter your phone number to check in your device for repair.
Screen will reset after 60 seconds of inactivity.
Please sign below to authorize the repair
By signing you authorize Bizarre Electronics to perform the described repair at the quoted estimate. We are not responsible for data loss — please back up your data before service.
Enter the device PIN to exit kiosk mode.
Thank you, %1$s. Our team will be with you shortly.
Ctrl+K on keyboard or long-press the dashboard FAB opens a quick-command overlay. Turn off for staff devices where this is distracting.
Dispatch jobs assigned to you will appear here.
Field service requires a server connection.
Confirm you have arrived at the customer\'s location.
This will close the job and notify the dispatcher.
This cannot be undone. The dispatcher will be notified.
Field service uses your location for ETA calculation and optional geofence arrival detection. Your location is not stored unless you opt in.
Your report goes directly to the shop admin
We\'ll send your report to %1$s. Diagnostic info (app version, server URL) is included only if you choose to attach it — no customer data is shared.
What happened? What were you trying to do?
App version, server URL, and last nav path. No customer data.
Email app opened — tap Send to submit your report.
No shortcuts defined for this screen.
Connect TV mode to display queue.\nGo to Settings → Display → Activate queue board.
There are no open slots for this date. Try a different day or contact the shop directly.
Online booking is not currently available for this location. Please contact the shop directly.
Your selected time will not be held. You can choose a new slot when you return.
Share this link with customers so they can book online.
Working hours, buffer times, and per-service toggles will be available in a future update.
The tracking link may have expired or is invalid. Contact the shop for help.
P&L data available once /reports/pl-summary is deployed.
Cash flow projections available once /reports/cashflow is deployed.
Tax jurisdiction data available once /reports/expense-breakdown is deployed.
Budget categories available once the budget API is deployed.
This screen is restricted to the owner role. Ask your admin to adjust your permissions.
Enter your PIN to view financial data.
Choose the order of tabs in the bottom navigation bar. The “More” tab is always last.
Update your server to enable marketing campaigns and segments.
Create your first campaign with the + button.
Send campaign “%s” to all eligible recipients now?
Save this campaign as a draft. You can activate it from the Campaigns screen.
SMS is sent only to customers who have opted in AND given marketing consent. STOP footer is appended automatically. Quiet hours are enforced server-side.
Create a segment to target a specific group of customers.
Create birthday, win-back, or review-request campaigns in the Campaigns screen to see them here.
Send a review-link SMS after a ticket is closed.
NPS score capture and detractor routing coming in a future update.
Send a review-request SMS for ticket #%d?
The server appends your configured review link (Google, Facebook, or Yelp) to the message template. Configure the link in Settings > Business Info.
Void this invoice as uncollectable. This cannot be undone.
A message with a payment link will be sent to %1$s.
Deactivate %1$s? Staff assigned here will lose their primary location. This cannot be undone without admin access.
Set %1$s as the default location? All other locations will lose default status.
Create a location to manage multiple shop sites.
